MOD_LIST_HIDER.VANILLA_TOOLTIP_ON:
Vanilla mode: ON
Multiplayer handshake sends no mods; peers see you as unmodded.
Mods still run locally (skins, UI, etc.).
Click to turn OFF; then each mod’s eye icon controls visibility in others’ mod lists.
MOD_LIST_HIDER.VANILLA_TOOLTIP_OFF:
Vanilla mode: OFF
Each mod’s eye icon (right of the row) controls whether that mod appears in others’ lists (open = visible, closed = hidden).
Turn ON vanilla mode (this icon) to join unmodded players or rooms.
